Foam Machine Rental in Fredericton NB

Fredericton is New Brunswick's capital city on the Saint John River — a vibrant university and government town known for its arts scene and festivals. Nova Kingdom Rentals is a Bridgewater-based inflatable and party rental company. Fredericton is New Brunswick's capital on the Saint John River, known for its university culture and arts scene, approximately 330 km from our base. We take selected larger events in New Brunswick — corporate events, school carnivals, and major community festivals — by availability and quote. Smaller local rentals should explore local NB suppliers for faster turnaround. Travel and staffing quoted separately. Final availability confirmed manually.

Fredericton NB is approximately 330 km from our Bridgewater base. New Brunswick bookings are for selected larger events only. Travel costs, accommodation requirements if applicable, availability, and all logistics are confirmed by quote before any commitment.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer foam parties in Fredericton NB?
Fredericton NB is approximately 330 km from Bridgewater. Selected larger NB foam party events are considered by availability and quote.
Is the foam safe for children?
Yes. Our foam is a non-toxic, biodegradable, hypoallergenic formula designed for children's events. It is safe for skin and eyes and does not stain clothing.
What are the age restrictions for a foam party?
Foam parties are designed for children. We do not operate foam parties at adult events or events where alcohol is present.
What are the pricing tiers for a kids foam party?
Standalone foam party pricing: up to 30 kids $349/hr, 31–80 kids $599/hr, 80+ kids from $800/hr. As an add-on to another rental: up to 30 kids $200/hr, 31–80 kids $350/hr, 80+ from $650/hr. All pricing confirmed at time of booking.
Does the foam party need to be outdoors?
Foam parties are typically set up outdoors on grass or a flat surface. Indoor foam parties require explicit pre-approval and we evaluate the venue for drainage and surface suitability. Contact us with your venue details.
